Tests the behavior of subtracting negative `Number.MAX_VALUE` from `Number.MAX_VALUE` in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of JavaScript's `Number.MAX_VALUE` when used in arithmetic operations. It verifies that subtracting the negative of `Number.MAX_VALUE` from `Number.MAX_VALUE` results in positive infinity (`+Infinity`). This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles large number arithmetic and the resulting overflow to infinity. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on the behavior of numeric limits and arithmetic operations in JavaScript.
